item.title: From sketch to viz
item.description: In this presentation, I share how I come up with ideas and what inspires me. It’s basically about how things never quite go the way I expect them to.

item.title: How I created an ML model to uncover drug-trafficking on Telegram
item.description: Poland’s online drug market runs on Telegram, uses the biggest post service, and a fast payment method app most people use to split restaurant bills. Here’s how we proved it — read the story or keep reading for the process.

item.title: My first job for printed press and how I learned InDesign in one day
item.description: I pitched a data visualization to a Polish lifestyle magazine. They said yes. Then I realized I had no idea how to actually deliver it for print.

item.title: When the deadline is due yesterday
item.description: Two days before publication, the Lithuanian prosecutor’s office decided to go public ahead of our investigation. That’s how I went from having two days to finish an interactive visualisation — to having twenty minutes.

item.title: About
item.description: Hugo, the world's fastest framework for building websites
